reviews.review_description: this is a challenging game just cool, but i'm stuck at this part of the game that there is no end in sight and it's really starting to piss me off and i have um tried to get a refund but i couldn't because i played more than 30 minutes of of the game i have attempted to go to the games website to know avail and so i'm just like stuck and i'm pissed
The movement is janky,the code for the first puzzle is hard to read and theres no indication on how to solve the second
